forgotten-depths-ii.description: A retro dungeon crawler built with Electron, TypeScript, and HTML5 Canvas. Features EGA-palette graphics at 640×400, first-person dungeon exploration with wall-segment rendering, turn-based combat on an isometric grid, a full town hub with shops and guild, and a data-driven content system. Built entirely by an automated AI pipeline.

gallery.caption: Screenshots coming soon — pipeline is still building!
